channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: faringcuddles443/iris
item.description: A modern shaders mod for Minecraft compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs 🔥 2026 UPDATE 🔥 iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod iris mod

item.title: howard3646/sodium
item.description: Sodium Minecraft visual optimization and quality Mod 🔥 NEW 2026 UPDATE 🔥 sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium sodium

item.title: parcadei/Continuous-Claude-v3
item.description: Context management for Claude Code. Hooks maintain state via ledgers and handoffs. MCP execution without context pollution. Agent orchestration with isolated context windows.

item.title: jarrodwatts/claude-delegator
item.description: Delegate tasks to Codex GPT 5.2 directly from within Claude Code.

item.title: ghuntley/how-to-ralph-wiggum
item.description: The Ralph Wiggum Technique—the AI development methodology that reduces software costs to less than a fast food worker's wage.

item.title: torvalds/AudioNoise
item.description: Random digital audio effects

item.title: steveyegge/gastown
item.description: Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager

item.title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claude-sisyphus
item.description: Sisyphus from OmO (Oh My Opencode), ported to the Claude Code SDK. Written with Claude Code — ironically. Anthropic, what are you gonna do next?

item.title: richhickson/claudecodeusage
item.description: (no description)

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL-Embedding
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ZeframLou/call-me
item.description: Minimal plugin that lets Claude Code call you on the phone.

item.title: jarrodwatts/claude-code-config
item.description: My personal Claude Code configuration - rules, hooks, agents, skills, and commands

item.title: samuel-vitorino/sopro
item.description: A lightweight text-to-speech model with zero-shot voice cloning

item.title: GBSOSS/skill-from-masters
item.description: Stand on the shoulders of giants — Create AI skills built on proven methodologies from domain experts.

item.title: snarktank/ralph
item.description: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs Amp repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.

item.title: Dimillian/CodexSkillManager
item.description: macOS app to manage your Codex skills

item.title: x011/smtp-tunnel-proxy
item.description: A high-speed covert tunnel that disguises TCP traffic as SMTP email communication to bypass Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) firewalls.

item.title: ophub/fnnas
item.description: Supports running FnNAS on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

item.title: ChrisWiles/claude-code-showcase
item.description: Comprehensive Claude Code project configuration example with hooks, skills, agents, commands, and GitHub Actions workflows

item.title: dvdsgl/claude-canvas
item.description: Give Claude Code an external monitor

item.title: marcoaapfortes/Mantic.sh
item.description: A structural code search engine for Al agents.

item.title: rberg27/doom-coding
item.description: A guide for how to use your smartphone to code anywhere at anytime.

item.title: kepano/obsidian-skills
item.description: Claude Skills for Obsidian

item.title: twofactor/pogicity-demo
item.description: (no description)

item.title: gabrielvaldivia/big-year
item.description: (no description)

item.title: HKUDS/DeepTutor
item.description: "DeepTutor: AI-Powered Personalized Learning Assistant"

item.title: Lightricks/LTX-2
item.description: (no description)

item.title: vercel-labs/ralph-loop-agent
item.description: Continuous Autonomy for the AI SDK

item.title: Adversis/tailsnitch
item.description: A security auditor for Tailscale configurations. Scans your tailnet for misconfigurations, overly permissive access controls, and security best practice violations.

item.title: AnmolSaini16/mapcn
item.description: Beautiful map components. 100% Free, Zero config, one command setup.

item.title: Dammyjay93/claude-design-skill
item.description: A Claude Code skill for crafted, enterprise-grade UI design

item.title: jenish-sojitra/JSAnalyzer
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ulab-uiuc/LLMRouter
item.description: LLMRouter: An Open-Source Library for LLM Routing

item.title: nibzard/awesome-agentic-patterns
item.description: A curated catalogue of awesome agentic AI patterns

item.title: BayramAnnakov/claude-reflect
item.description: A self-learning system for Claude Code that captures corrections, positive feedback, and preferences — then syncs them to CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.

item.title: huseyinbabal/taws
item.description: Terminal UI for AWS (taws) - A terminal-based AWS resource viewer and manager

item.title: clawdbot/clawdbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform.

item.title: numman-ali/cc-mirror
item.description: Create multiple isolated Claude Code variants with custom providers (Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, LiteLLM)

item.title: openprose/prose
item.description: (no description)

item.title: pranshuparmar/witr
item.description: Why is this running?

item.title: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

item.title: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
item.description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition.

item.title: CloudAI-X/claude-workflow-v2
item.description: Universal Claude Code workflow plugin with agents, skills, hooks, and commands
